message:
style(tests): satisfy clippy::items_after_statements and too_many_lines on #248 regression test

Move `const ISSUE_COUNT` to the top of the function before any statements
and add `#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]` — the test is a linear sequence
of reproduction steps (create issues, flush, delete DB, force-import,
verify integrity + close) with no naturally extractable helper functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
